title: 1971 War: Executive Summary
summary: Masterclass in breaking a superpower-backed proxy state within 13 days.
scenario: Indian forces achieved the largest surrender of personnel (93,000) since WWII. Objective: neutralize genocidal crackdown in the East while holding the West.

title: Macro Threat Matrix: US-China-Pak Axis
summary: India's sovereignty test against a coordinated tripartite threat.
scenario: The US provided hardware and diplomatic cover to Pakistan. China mobilized forces on the Himalayan border to pin down Indian divisions. India was the '0.5 Front' in the Cold War.
keywords: US-China-Pak axis, tripartite threat, cold war, 0.5 front

title: Task Force 74: The USS Enterprise Gambit
summary: US deployment of nuclear-powered USS Enterprise to intimidate India.
scenario: The deployment of Task Force 74 into the Bay of Bengal was a blunt instrument of 'Gunboat Diplomacy'. Echoes are seen today in 'Freedom of Navigation' operations.
keywords: uss enterprise, task force 74, gunboat diplomacy, bay of bengal

title: The 2024 Bangladesh Reset
summary: Return of the 'American Shadow' to the Bay of Bengal following regime change.
scenario: Following 2024 leadership change in Dhaka, pattern of destabilization and 'friendly' regime installation echoes 1971 maneuvers. US interest in Saint Martin's Island vs 1971 desired base.
keywords: bangladesh 2024, saint martin's island, regime change, american shadow
